pageSubtitle: My journey turning complex problems into scalable solutions.

items.description: Responsible for the design, implementation and deployment of the back-end logic of various services.
highlights: Developed and deployed backend systems using Django & FastAPI on Google Cloud Run.
Use AI aided coding to speed up developer process (Vibecoding).
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality software.

items.description: Responsible for the design, implementation and deployment of certain internal and client projects, as well as the mentoring of cadets in intership.
highlights: Mentored and trained interns in backend development best practices, coding standards, and software engineering principles.
Developed and deployed backend systems using Django and PostgreSQL.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality software.

items.description: Specializing in backend development, server-side logic management and database administration to ensure smooth running of systems.
highlights: Developed and maintained backend systems using Django, FastAPI, and PostgreSQL.
Implemented APIs and microservices for various applications.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality software.

items.description: Contribution to the development of certain functionalities and maintenance of the product, integrating AI functionalities.
highlights: Contributed to the development of new features and the maintenance of existing ones.
Integrated AI functionalities into the product.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality software.
